controls.control_objective: To ensure be called the reserve bank of india (urban co-operative banks - undertaking of financial services) directions, 2025
controls.control_description:
These Directions shall be called the Reserve Bank of India (Urban Co-operative
Banks - Undertaking of Financial Services) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be called the reserve bank of india (urban co-operative banks - undertaking of financial services) directions, 2025

controls.control_objective: To ensure come into force with immediate effect
controls.control_description: 1These Directions shall come into force with immediate effect.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to come into force with immediate effect

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable to urban co-operative banks (hereinafter collectively referred to as 'ucbs' and individually as 'a ucb') operating in india
controls.control_description:
These Directions shall be applicable to Urban Co-operative Banks (hereinafter
collectively referred to as 'UCBs' and individually as 'a UCB') operating in India.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable to urban co-operative banks (hereinafter collectively referred to as 'ucbs' and individually as 'a ucb') operating in india

controls.control_objective: To ensure mean primary co-operative banks as defined under section 5(ccv) read with section 56 of banking regulation act, 1949
controls.control_description:
In this context, Urban Co-operative Banks shall mean Primary Co-operative
Banks as defined under Section 5(ccv) read with Section 56 of Banking
Regulation Act, 1949.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to mean primary co-operative banks as defined under section 5(ccv) read with section 56 of banking regulation act, 1949

controls.control_objective: To ensure bear the meanings assigned to them below: (1) 'debtor company' means any company to which a ucb currently has or previously had a loan or investment e
controls.control_description:
In these directions, unless the context otherwise requires, the terms herein shall
bear the meanings assigned to them below:
(1) 'Debtor company' means any company to which a UCB currently has or
previously had a loan or investment exposure (excluding equity instruments)
anytime during the preceding twelve months;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to bear the meanings assigned to them below: (1) 'debtor company' means any company to which a ucb currently has or previously had a loan or investment e

controls.control_objective: To ensure equity shares, compulsorily convertible preference shares (ccps) and compulsorily convertible debentures (ccd)
controls.control_description:
(2) 'Equity instrument' means equity shares, compulsorily convertible
preference shares (CCPS) and compulsorily convertible debentures (CCD);
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to equity shares, compulsorily convertible preference shares (ccps) and compulsorily convertible debentures (ccd)

controls.control_objective: To ensure a company engaged in the 'business of financial services'
controls.control_description:
(3) 'Financial Services Company' means a company engaged in the 'business
of financial services';
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to a company engaged in the 'business of financial services'

controls.control_objective: To ensure include -
controls.control_description: Explanation: The 'business of financial services' shall include -
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to include -

controls.control_objective: To ensure pass a resolution approving the proposal to that effect
controls.control_description:
The Board of a UCB desirous of undertaking insurance business as corporate
agent without risk participation shall pass a resolution approving the proposal to
that effect.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to pass a resolution approving the proposal to that effect

controls.control_objective: To ensure approve proposal
controls.control_description:
The Board shall approve proposal, if any, for entering into contracts
(including for longer-terms) with insurance companies for undertaking insurance
business on a referral basis (without risk participation and with sharing of
physical space).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to approve proposal

controls.control_objective: To ensure pass a resolution to that effect
controls.control_description:
Further, Board of a UCB desirous of undertaking mutual fund
business shall pass a resolution to that effect.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to pass a resolution to that effect

controls.control_objective: To ensure approve and pass a resolution to that effect
controls.control_description:
The Board of a UCB desirous of applying for AD Category-I/II license shall
approve and pass a resolution to that effect.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to approve and pass a resolution to that effect

controls.control_objective: To ensure offer investment tips or recommendations to customers, nor undertake portfolio management services, while providing online trading facilities to demat
controls.control_description:
The Board of a UCB desirous of providing online trading facility to its demat
account holders shall pass a resolution confirming that the UCB shall not offer
investment tips or recommendations to customers, nor undertake portfolio
management services, while providing online trading facilities to demat account
holders.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to offer investment tips or recommendations to customers, nor undertake portfolio management services, while providing online trading facilities to demat

controls.control_objective: To ensure approve a comprehensive policy covering merchant acquisition and customer grievance redressal mechanism for deployment of third-party point-of-sale te
controls.control_description:
The Board shall approve a comprehensive policy covering merchant acquisition
and customer grievance redressal mechanism for deployment of third-party
point-of-sale terminals.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to approve a comprehensive policy covering merchant acquisition and customer grievance redressal mechanism for deployment of third-party point-of-sale te

controls.control_objective: To ensure frame and approve a detailed policy on customer grievance redressal mechanism, including an escalation matrix for resolution of complaints, prior to u
controls.control_description:
The Board shall frame and approve a detailed policy on customer grievance
redressal mechanism, including an escalation matrix for resolution of
complaints, prior to undertaking issuance of Pre-paid Payment Instruments.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to frame and approve a detailed policy on customer grievance redressal mechanism, including an escalation matrix for resolution of complaints, prior to u

controls.control_objective: To ensure have suitable provisions governing its investments in an aif scheme, compliant with extant law and regulations
controls.control_description:
A UCB's investment policy shall have suitable provisions governing its
investments in an AIF Scheme, compliant with extant law and regulations.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have suitable provisions governing its investments in an aif scheme, compliant with extant law and regulations

controls.control_objective: To ensure individually contribute more than 10 percent of the corpus of an aif scheme
controls.control_description:
A UCB shall not individually contribute more than 10 percent of the corpus of an
AIF Scheme.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to individually contribute more than 10 percent of the corpus of an aif scheme

controls.control_objective: To ensure be more than 20 percent of the corpus of that scheme
controls.control_description:
The aggregate contribution by all Regulated Entities (REs) in any AIF Scheme
shall not be more than 20 percent of the corpus of that scheme.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be more than 20 percent of the corpus of that scheme

controls.control_objective: To ensure mean: (1) commercial banks (including small finance banks, local area banks)
controls.control_description:
<image>
In this context, 'RE' shall mean:
(1) Commercial Banks (including Small Finance Banks, Local Area Banks);
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to mean: (1) commercial banks (including small finance banks, local area banks)

controls.control_objective: To ensure be required to make 100 percent provision to the extent of its proportionate investment in the debtor company through the aif scheme
controls.control_description:
Where a UCB contributes more than five percent of the corpus of an AIF Scheme
that has downstream investment (excluding equity instruments) in a debtor
company of the UCB, the UCB shall be required to make 100 percent provision
to the extent of its proportionate investment in the debtor company through the
AIF Scheme, subject to a cap equivalent to UCB's direct loan and / or investment
exposure to the said debtor company.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be required to make 100 percent provision to the extent of its proportionate investment in the debtor company through the aif scheme

controls.control_objective: To ensure deduct the entire investment from its capital funds ‒ proportionately from both tier-1 and tier-2 capital (wherever applicable)
controls.control_description:
Notwithstanding the provisions of paragraph 14, where a UCB's contribution is
in the form of subordinated units, it shall deduct the entire investment from its
capital funds ‒ proportionately from both Tier-1 and Tier-2 capital (wherever
applicable).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to deduct the entire investment from its capital funds ‒ proportionately from both tier-1 and tier-2 capital (wherever applicable)

controls.control_objective: To ensure , in consultation with the government of india, by way of a notification, exempt certain aifs (annex i) from the scope of these directions on aif contained in part b of chapter ii
controls.control_description:
2The RBI may, in consultation with the Government of India, by way of a
notification, exempt certain AIFs (Annex I) from the scope of these Directions on
AIF contained in Part B of Chapter II, except for paragraph 11.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , in consultation with the government of india, by way of a notification, exempt certain aifs (annex i) from the scope of these directions on aif contained in part b of chapter ii

controls.control_objective: To ensure be permitted to enter into agreements with mutual funds (mfs) for marketing their units subject to the following terms and conditions: (1) a ucb shall
controls.control_description:
A UCB shall be permitted to enter into agreements with Mutual Funds (MFs) for
marketing their units subject to the following terms and conditions:
(1) A UCB shall act as an agent of the customers and shall be responsible
for forwarding the investors' application for purchase / sale of MF units to
the Mutual Fund / the Registrar / the transfer agents.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be permitted to enter into agreements with mutual funds (mfs) for marketing their units subject to the following terms and conditions: (1) a ucb shall

controls.control_objective: To ensure guarantee any assured return on such investments
controls.control_description:
(2) The purchase of MF units shall be at the customers' risk and the UCB
shall not guarantee any assured return on such investments.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to guarantee any assured return on such investments

controls.control_objective: To ensure neither acquire such units of mutual fund from the secondary market nor shall it buy back units of mutual funds from its customers
controls.control_description:
(3) A UCB shall neither acquire such units of Mutual Fund from the
secondary market nor shall it buy back units of Mutual Funds from its
customers.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to neither acquire such units of mutual fund from the secondary market nor shall it buy back units of mutual funds from its customers

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that its own investment
controls.control_description:
(4) A UCB holding custody of MF units on behalf of their customers shall
ensure that its own investment, where permitted, are kept distinct from
the investments belonging to its customers.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that its own investment

controls.control_objective: To ensure be restricted to branches of the ucb
controls.control_description:
(5) The distribution of Mutual Fund units shall be restricted to branches of
the UCB.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be restricted to branches of the ucb

controls.control_objective: To ensure comply with the extant kyc / aml guidelines in respect of the applicants
controls.control_description:
(6) A UCB shall comply with the extant KYC / AML guidelines in respect of
the applicants.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to comply with the extant kyc / aml guidelines in respect of the applicants

controls.control_objective: To ensure report the details of the tie-up together with a copy of the agreement entered into with the mutual fund, to the concerned office of department of sup
controls.control_description:
A UCB shall report the details of the tie-up together with a copy of the agreement
entered into with the Mutual Fund, to the concerned office of Department of
Supervision, RBI within a period of ten days from the date of entering into the
arrangement.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to report the details of the tie-up together with a copy of the agreement entered into with the mutual fund, to the concerned office of department of sup

controls.control_objective: To ensure disclose to its customers details of all types of commissions / fees (in any form) received from the various mutual fund companies for marketing / ref
controls.control_description:
A UCB shall disclose to its customers details of all types of commissions / fees
(in any form) received from the various mutual fund companies for marketing /
referring their products to them.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to disclose to its customers details of all types of commissions / fees (in any form) received from the various mutual fund companies for marketing / ref

controls.control_objective: To ensure have violated individual and group exposure norms prescribed by rbi
controls.control_description:
Eligibility Conditions: A UCB shall be permitted to undertake insurance business
as corporate agent without risk participation subject to the following conditions:
(1) A UCB shall not have violated individual and group exposure norms
prescribed by RBI;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have violated individual and group exposure norms prescribed by rbi

controls.control_objective: To ensure have complied with rbi instructions on loans and advances to directors, their relatives, and associated firms
controls.control_description:
<image>
(2) A UCB shall have complied with RBI instructions on loans and advances
to directors, their relatives, and associated firms;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have complied with rbi instructions on loans and advances to directors, their relatives, and associated firms

controls.control_objective: To ensure adopt any restrictive practice of compelling its customers to opt for a particular insurance company in respect of products marketed by it
controls.control_description:
A UCB shall not adopt any restrictive practice of compelling its customers to opt
for a particular insurance company in respect of products marketed by it.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to adopt any restrictive practice of compelling its customers to opt for a particular insurance company in respect of products marketed by it

controls.control_objective: To ensure disclose to its customers details of all types of commissions/fees (in any form) received from the insurance company for marketing their products to t
controls.control_description:
A UCB
shall disclose to its customers details of all types of commissions/fees (in any
form) received from the insurance company for marketing their products to them.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to disclose to its customers details of all types of commissions/fees (in any form) received from the insurance company for marketing their products to t

controls.control_objective: To ensure provide physical infrastructure within its branch premises to insurance companies for selling their insurance products to the ucb's customers with ade
controls.control_description:
Under the referral arrangement, a UCB shall provide physical infrastructure
within its branch premises to insurance companies for selling their insurance
products to the UCB's customers with adequate disclosure and transparency,
and in turn earn referral fees on the basis of premia collected.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to provide physical infrastructure within its branch premises to insurance companies for selling their insurance products to the ucb's customers with ade

controls.control_objective: To ensure be subject to the following conditions: (1) a ucb shall comply with the relevant irdai regulations for undertaking referral business with insurance co
controls.control_description:
The above
permission shall be subject to the following conditions:
(1) A UCB shall comply with the relevant IRDAI regulations for undertaking
referral business with insurance companies;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be subject to the following conditions: (1) a ucb shall comply with the relevant irdai regulations for undertaking referral business with insurance co

controls.control_objective: To ensure adopt any restrictive practice of compelling its customers to opt for a particular insurance company, particularly in respect of assets financed by th
controls.control_description:
(2) A UCB shall not adopt any restrictive practice of compelling its customers
to opt for a particular insurance company, particularly in respect of assets
financed by the UCB.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to adopt any restrictive practice of compelling its customers to opt for a particular insurance company, particularly in respect of assets financed by th

controls.control_objective: To ensure be allowed to exercise their own choice of insurer
controls.control_description:
The customers shall be allowed to exercise their
own choice of insurer;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be allowed to exercise their own choice of insurer

controls.control_objective: To ensure also enter into an agreement with the concerned insurance company for allowing use of its premises and making use of the existing infrastructure of th
controls.control_description:
(3) A UCB desirous of entering into referral arrangement, in addition to
complying with IRDAI regulations, shall also enter into an agreement with
the concerned insurance company for allowing use of its premises and
making use of the existing infrastructure of the UCB;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also enter into an agreement with the concerned insurance company for allowing use of its premises and making use of the existing infrastructure of th

controls.control_objective: To ensure be for a maximum period of three years at the first instance and the ucb shall have the discretion to renegotiate the terms or replace it by another a
controls.control_description:
(4) The initial agreement shall be for a maximum period of three years at the
first instance and the UCB shall have the discretion to renegotiate the
terms or replace it by another agreement after the initial period,
depending on its satisfaction with the service;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be for a maximum period of three years at the first instance and the ucb shall have the discretion to renegotiate the terms or replace it by another a

controls.control_objective: To ensure be free to sign a longer- term contract with the approval of its board
controls.control_description:
<image>
(5) Upon completion of the initial period, a UCB shall be free to sign a longer-
term contract with the approval of its Board;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be free to sign a longer- term contract with the approval of its board

controls.control_objective: To ensure be purely on a voluntary basis and the same shall be stated in a prominent way in all publicity material distributed by the ucb
controls.control_description:
(6) Participation by a customer in insurance products shall be purely on a
voluntary basis and the same shall be stated in a prominent way in all
publicity material distributed by the UCB.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be purely on a voluntary basis and the same shall be stated in a prominent way in all publicity material distributed by the ucb

controls.control_objective: To ensure be no direct or indirect linkage between the provision of banking services offered by the ucb to its customers and use of the insurance products
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be no direct or indirect linkage between the provision of banking services offered by the ucb to its customers and use of the insurance products

controls.control_objective: To ensure be transferred to the business of the ucb
controls.control_description:
and
(7) The risk, if any, involved in referral arrangement shall not be transferred
to the business of the UCB.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be transferred to the business of the ucb

controls.control_objective: To ensure require prior approval from the rbi to undertake referral business
controls.control_description:
A UCB shall not require prior approval from the RBI to undertake referral
business.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to require prior approval from the rbi to undertake referral business

controls.control_objective: To ensure mandatorily disclose to customers the details of all commissions, fees, or any other form of remuneration received
controls.control_description:
In order to ensure transparency and protect the interest of customers, a UCB
shall mandatorily disclose to customers the details of all commissions, fees, or
any other form of remuneration received, if any, from the respective insurance
companies whose products are being referred to.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to mandatorily disclose to customers the details of all commissions, fees, or any other form of remuneration received

controls.control_objective: To ensure be eligible to apply for a license as authorized dealers (ad) category i / ii subject to compliance with the following norms: (1) ad category-i
controls.control_description:
A UCB shall be eligible to apply for a license as Authorized Dealers (AD)
Category I / II subject to compliance with the following norms:
(1) AD Category-I
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be eligible to apply for a license as authorized dealers (ad) category i / ii subject to compliance with the following norms: (1) ad category-i

controls.control_objective: To ensure be included in the second schedule to rbi act 1934
controls.control_description: (i) A UCB shall be included in the Second Schedule to RBI Act 1934;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be included in the second schedule to rbi act 1934

controls.control_objective: To ensure have a minimum net worth of ₹200 crore
controls.control_description: (ii) A UCB shall have a minimum net worth of ₹200 crore;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have a minimum net worth of ₹200 crore

controls.control_objective: To ensure be less than 12 percent
controls.control_description: (iii) The CRAR shall not be less than 12 percent;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be less than 12 percent

controls.control_objective: To ensure exceed 10 percent
controls.control_description: (iv) The gross NPA shall not exceed 10 percent;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to exceed 10 percent

controls.control_objective: To ensure have made profit in the preceding three years
controls.control_description: (v) A UCB shall have made profit in the preceding three years;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have made profit in the preceding three years

controls.control_objective: To ensure have no defaults in maintenance of crr / slr requirements
controls.control_description:
(vi) A UCB shall have no defaults in maintenance of CRR / SLR
requirements;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have no defaults in maintenance of crr / slr requirements

controls.control_objective: To ensure have sound internal control systems
controls.control_description: (vii) A UCB shall have sound internal control systems;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have sound internal control systems

controls.control_objective: To ensure have an elected board of management with at least two professionals
controls.control_description:
(viii) A UCB shall have an elected board of management with at least
two professionals.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have an elected board of management with at least two professionals

controls.control_objective: To ensure have a minimum net worth of ₹10 crore
controls.control_description: (i) A UCB shall have a minimum net worth of ₹10 crore;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have a minimum net worth of ₹10 crore

controls.control_objective: To ensure be less than nine percent
controls.control_description: (ii) The CRAR shall not be less than nine percent;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be less than nine percent

controls.control_objective: To ensure exceed 10 percent
controls.control_description: (iii) The gross NPAs shall not exceed 10 percent;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to exceed 10 percent

controls.control_objective: To ensure have made profit in the preceding three years
controls.control_description: (iv) A UCB shall have made profit in the preceding three years;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have made profit in the preceding three years

controls.control_objective: To ensure have no defaults in maintenance of crr / slr requirements
controls.control_description:
(v) A UCB shall have no defaults in maintenance of CRR / SLR
requirements;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have no defaults in maintenance of crr / slr requirements

controls.control_objective: To ensure have sound internal control systems
controls.control_description: (vi) A UCB shall have sound internal control systems;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have sound internal control systems

controls.control_objective: To ensure have an elected board of management with at least two professional directors
controls.control_description:
(vii) A UCB shall have an elected board of management with at least
two professional directors.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have an elected board of management with at least two professional directors

controls.control_objective: To ensure submit its application through pravaah portal (https://pravaah
controls.control_description:
A UCB fulfilling the above-mentioned eligibility criterion and willing to apply for
AD authorisation shall submit its application through Pravaah Portal
(https://pravaah.rbi.org.in) to Department of Regulation, RBI with the document
/ information as specified under:
(1) A copy of the latest audited balance sheet;
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to submit its application through pravaah portal (https://pravaah

controls.control_objective: To ensure be granted
controls.control_description: Fresh authorizations for UCBs to function as FFMC shall not be granted.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be granted

controls.control_objective: To ensure be less than ₹500 crore as per last inspection report
controls.control_description:
A Scheduled UCB, shall be eligible to provide online trading facility to its demat
account holders by entering into a tie-up with a broking entity with prior approval
of the RBI, subject to fulfilling the following criteria:
<image>
(1) The assessed net worth of the UCB shall not be less than ₹500 crore as
per last inspection report;
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to be less than ₹500 crore as per last inspection report

controls.control_objective: To ensure be financially sound and well managed, as per criteria prescribed in our reserve bank of india (urban co-operative banks - branch authorisation) direc
controls.control_description:
(2) A UCB shall be Financially Sound and Well Managed, as per criteria
prescribed in our Reserve Bank of India (Urban Co-operative Banks -
Branch Authorisation) Directions, 2025,
(3) A UCB shall be registered with SEBI as Depository Participant;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be financially sound and well managed, as per criteria prescribed in our reserve bank of india (urban co-operative banks - branch authorisation) direc

controls.control_objective: To ensure have fully implemented core banking solutions (cbs) and shall be offering internet banking services to its customers
controls.control_description:
and
(4) A UCB shall have fully implemented Core Banking Solutions (CBS) and
shall be offering Internet Banking services to its customers.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have fully implemented core banking solutions (cbs) and shall be offering internet banking services to its customers

controls.control_objective: To ensure submit its application through pravaah portal (https://pravaah
controls.control_description:
A UCB fulfilling the criteria prescribed in paragraph 31 above and desirous of
providing online trading facility to its demat account holders shall submit its
application through PRAVAAH Portal (https://pravaah.rbi.org.in) to Department
of Regulation, RBI with a copy of Board Resolution to the effect that they shall
not be offering tips / recommendations to their customers for on-line trading and
shall also not be undertaking portfolio management services.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to submit its application through pravaah portal (https://pravaah

controls.control_objective: To ensure be eligible to undertake the activity of providing point of presence (pop) services for national pension system (nps) regulated by pension fund regula
controls.control_description:
A Scheduled UCB classified as Financially Sound and Well Managed in terms
of the criteria given in our Reserve Bank of India (Urban Co-operative Banks -
Branch Authorisation) Directions, 2025, shall be eligible to undertake the activity
of providing Point of Presence (PoP) Services for National Pension System
(NPS) regulated by Pension Fund Regulatory and Development Authority
(PFRDA) subject to the following conditions:
(1) A UCB shall have a minimum net worth of ₹100 crore as per immediate
preceding inspection report of the RBI;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be eligible to undertake the activity of providing point of presence (pop) services for national pension system (nps) regulated by pension fund regula

controls.control_objective: To ensure have fully implemented core banking solutions (cbs)
controls.control_description: (2) A UCB shall have fully implemented Core Banking Solutions (CBS);
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have fully implemented core banking solutions (cbs)

controls.control_objective: To ensure have no strictures (penalty / letter of warning / displeasure / cautionary advice) imposed on them during the last five years by the rbi / registrar o
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have no strictures (penalty / letter of warning / displeasure / cautionary advice) imposed on them during the last five years by the rbi / registrar o

controls.control_objective: To ensure have at least 25 branches spread across a minimum of 25 districts in three or more states with it infrastructure and electronically linked to central
controls.control_description:
and
(4) A UCB shall have at least 25 branches spread across a minimum of 25
districts in three or more states with IT infrastructure and electronically
linked to Central Record keeping Agency (CRA).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have at least 25 branches spread across a minimum of 25 districts in three or more states with it infrastructure and electronically linked to central

controls.control_objective: To ensure submit its application through pravaah portal (https://pravaah
controls.control_description:
A UCB fulfilling the criteria prescribed in paragraph 33 above and desirous of
undertaking activity of providing PoP Services shall submit its application
through PRAVAAH Portal (https://pravaah.rbi.org.in) to Department of
Regulation, RBI.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to submit its application through pravaah portal (https://pravaah

controls.control_objective: To ensure exercise due care in the discharge of its functions as any act of commission (like misappropriation of subscription received) or omission (to remit in
controls.control_description:
A UCB acting as 'PoP' shall exercise due care in the discharge of its functions
as any act of commission (like misappropriation of subscription received) or
omission (to remit in time the subscriptions received) on the part of the UCB
acting as agent and failure to comply with the provisions of the Pension Fund
Regulatory and Development Authority (PFRDA) Act, 2013 may entail imposition
of penalty by PFRDA.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to exercise due care in the discharge of its functions as any act of commission (like misappropriation of subscription received) or omission (to remit in

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure adherence to all the instructions issued by pfrda from time to time
controls.control_description:
A UCB acting as PoP shall ensure adherence to all the
instructions issued by PFRDA from time to time.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure adherence to all the instructions issued by pfrda from time to time

controls.control_objective: To ensure be permitted to deploy its own pos terminals with prior approval of rbi subject to fulfilling the following criteria: (1) a ucb shall comply with crit
controls.control_description:
A UCB intending to act as POS acquiring bank shall be permitted to deploy its
own POS terminals with prior approval of RBI subject to fulfilling the following
criteria:
(1) A UCB shall comply with criteria mentioned in clauses (i) to (vii) of
paragraph 36 above;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be permitted to deploy its own pos terminals with prior approval of rbi subject to fulfilling the following criteria: (1) a ucb shall comply with crit

controls.control_objective: To ensure have been subjected to an is audit not earlier than six months from the date of application, certifying that the systems are adequately secure
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have been subjected to an is audit not earlier than six months from the date of application, certifying that the systems are adequately secure

controls.control_objective: To ensure be more than ₹25 crore as per the last rbi inspection
controls.control_description:
(3) The assessed net-worth of the UCB shall be more than ₹25 crore as per
the last RBI inspection;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be more than ₹25 crore as per the last rbi inspection

controls.control_objective: To ensure be less than seven percent and net npas shall be less than three percent in the preceding financial year
controls.control_description:
(4) The Gross NPA of the UCB shall be less than seven percent and net
NPAs shall be less than three percent in the preceding financial year;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be less than seven percent and net npas shall be less than three percent in the preceding financial year

controls.control_objective: To ensure have been subjected to any monetary penalty by the rbi during the last two financial years and during the year of submitting application
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have been subjected to any monetary penalty by the rbi during the last two financial years and during the year of submitting application

controls.control_objective: To ensure be any default in the maintenance of crr / slr during the preceding financial year
controls.control_description:
(6) There shall not be any default in the maintenance of CRR / SLR during
the preceding financial year;

controls.control_objective: To ensure be a member of authorized card network, such as rupay, visa, or mastercard, etc

and
(7) A UCB shall be a member of authorized card network, such as RuPay,
Visa, or MasterCard, etc.

controls.control_objective: To ensure comply with instructions and guidelines on merchant acquisition for card transactions and pos issued by department of payment and settlement systems
controls.control_description:
A UCB shall comply with instructions and guidelines on Merchant Acquisition for
card transactions and POS issued by Department of Payment and Settlement
Systems, RBI from time to time.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to comply with instructions and guidelines on merchant acquisition for card transactions and pos issued by department of payment and settlement systems

controls.control_objective: To ensure apply through pravaah portal (https://pravaah
controls.control_description:
A UCB desirous to deploy their own POS terminals and act as POS acquiring
bank shall apply through PRAVAAH Portal (https://pravaah.rbi.org.in) to
Department of Regulation, RBI for necessary permission, with the requisite
information and documents.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to apply through pravaah portal (https://pravaah

controls.control_objective: To ensure have its own atm network and there should be no restrictions on acceptance or repayment of deposits
controls.control_description:
A licensed UCB desirous of issuing Prepaid Payment Instruments (PPIs) shall
have its own ATM network and there should be no restrictions on acceptance or
repayment of deposits.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have its own atm network and there should be no restrictions on acceptance or repayment of deposits

controls.control_objective: To ensure be subject to compliance with eligibility criteria and other guidelines as prescribed by department of payment and settlement systems (dpss), rbi from
controls.control_description:
Further, issuance of Prepaid Payment Instruments shall
be subject to compliance with eligibility criteria and other guidelines as
prescribed by Department of Payment and Settlement Systems (DPSS), RBI
from time to time.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to be subject to compliance with eligibility criteria and other guidelines as prescribed by department of payment and settlement systems (dpss), rbi from

controls.control_objective: To ensure be permitted to issue ppis
controls.control_description:
A UCB satisfying the criteria specified in paragraph 41 shall be permitted to issue
PPIs, subject to compliance with the following regulatory requirements for this
purpose:
(1) A UCB shall be CBS compliant;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be permitted to issue ppis

controls.control_objective: To ensure be less than 10 percent in the current and preceding financial year
controls.control_description:
(2) The CRAR shall not be less than 10 percent in the current and preceding
financial year;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be less than 10 percent in the current and preceding financial year

controls.control_objective: To ensure be more than three percent in the current and preceding financial year
controls.control_description:
(3) Gross NPAs shall be less than seven percent and net NPAs shall not be
more than three percent in the current and preceding financial year;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be more than three percent in the current and preceding financial year

controls.control_objective: To ensure be more than ₹25 crore as per the last rbi inspection
controls.control_description:
(4) Assessed net-worth shall be more than ₹25 crore as per the last RBI
inspection;

controls.control_objective: To ensure be no default in the maintenance of crr/slr during the current and preceding financial year

(5) There shall be no default in the maintenance of CRR/SLR during the
current and preceding financial year;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be no default in the maintenance of crr/slr during the current and preceding financial year

controls.control_objective: To ensure have made a net profit in the preceding financial year
controls.control_description: (6) A UCB should have made a net profit in the preceding financial year;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have made a net profit in the preceding financial year

and shall have the following systems and control in place:

(9) A UCB shall not have been subjected to any monetary penalty by the
RBI during the last two financial years and in the year of the application;

controls.control_description:
and

approved policy on Customer grievance redressal mechanism which
includes escalation matrix for resolution of customer complaints.

controls.control_objective: To ensure also be guided by the instructions issued in this regard by dpss, rbi from time to time
controls.control_description:
The issuance and operation of prepaid instruments shall also be guided by the
instructions issued in this regard by DPSS, RBI from time to time.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also be guided by the instructions issued in this regard by dpss, rbi from time to time

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to remain repealed
controls.control_description:
The
directions, instructions, and guidelines repealed prior to the issuance of these
Directions shall continue to remain repealed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to remain repealed

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to be governed by the provisions thereof
controls.control_description:
Notwithstanding such repeal, any action taken or purported to have been taken,
or initiated under the repealed Directions, instructions, or guidelines shall
continue to be governed by the provisions thereof.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to be governed by the provisions thereof

controls.control_objective: To ensure be deemed as governed by these directions
controls.control_description:
All approvals or
acknowledgments granted under these repealed lists shall be deemed as
governed by these Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be deemed as governed by these directions

controls.control_objective: To ensure in any way prejudicially affect: (1) any right, obligation or liability acquired, accrued, or incurred thereunder
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to in any way prejudicially affect: (1) any right, obligation or liability acquired, accrued, or incurred thereunder

controls.control_objective: To ensure be instituted, continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guideline
controls.control_description:
and any such investigation, legal proceedings or remedy may
be instituted, continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or
punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or
guidelines had not been repealed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be instituted, continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guideline

controls.control_objective: To ensure be in addition to, and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being in force
controls.control_description:
The provisions of these Directions shall be in addition to, and not in derogation
of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time
being in force.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be in addition to, and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being in force

controls.control_objective: To ensure be final and binding
controls.control_description:
For the purpose of giving effect to the provisions of these Directions or in order
to remove any difficulties in the application or interpretation of the provisions of
these Directions, the RBI may, if it considers necessary, issue necessary
clarifications in respect of any matter covered herein and the interpretation of
any provision of these Directions given by the RBI shall be final and binding.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be final and binding
